note: Godot binary not available in sandbox — full static code analysis performed instead of headless execution.
scope: Full startup trace + one complete card cycle verification across all key systems.

step_1_autoloads.detail: GameManager._ready() creates MerlinStore via call_deferred('add_child', store). MerlinStore NOT in project.godot autoloads (expected — created programmatically). MerlinAI is autoload and wired into store in MerlinStore._ready().

step_2_store_null_race.detail: MerlinGameController._ready() does 'await get_tree().process_frame' before calling start_run(). This 1-frame delay ensures call_deferred from GameManager fires first. MerlinStore is guaranteed present when start_run() executes.

step_3_start_run.detail: store.dispatch(START_RUN) calls StoreRun.init_run() which sets life_essence=100, cards_played=0, active_promises=[], season (real date), mission. MOS telltale: no pacing recovery (removed cycle 9, director q-005). No drain (LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=0).

step_4_biome_resolution.detail: Biome resolved from GameManager.run dict (keys: current_biome, biome.id). Falls back to MerlinConstants.BIOME_DEFAULT='foret_broceliande'. dominant_faction present in all 8 BIOMES entries (confirmed cycle 11). MerlinVisual.apply_biome_crt() called.

step_1_generate.detail: generate_card() tries event/promise/merlin_direct typed paths first, then LLM (if MerlinAI available), then FastRoute fallback. FastRoute always returns a valid card (emergency card if pool exhausted). _emergency_card() always has 3 options with valid effects.

step_2_validate.detail: _validate_card(): requires text, min 2 options, max 3 effects/option, all effect types in VALID_CODES. _ensure_3_options(): pads to exactly 3 options, trims if >3. Guard is effective.

step_3_resolve.detail: resolve_choice(): applies effects via Callable, increments cards_played ONCE (single canonical owner since PAT-005 fix), appends to story_log (capped at 2 entries), updates player_profile, ticks Ogham cooldowns, runs biome passive (legacy path), checks promise deadlines.

step_4_effects.detail: DAMAGE_LIFE: clamped to min 0 via maxi(old-amount, 0). HEAL_LIFE: clamped to LIFE_ESSENCE_MAX=100 via mini(old+amount, 100). ADD_REPUTATION: capped ±20/card in merlin_effect_engine, then clamped 0-100. scale_and_cap() uses MULTIPLIER_TABLE correctly. signal reputation_changed called with new_val.

step_5_run_end_check.detail: check_run_end(): life<=0 → death. Mission complete + cards>=25 → victory (3 types). hard_max=50 → forced end. soft_max/target_max/target_min/soft_min → tension zones (critical/high/rising/low). MOS constants from CLAUDE.md: soft_min=8, target 20-25, hard_max=50. ✓

invariants.rep_cap_20_per_card: PASS — merlin_effect_engine.gd: clampi(delta, -20, 20) THEN clampi(result, FACTION_SCORE_MIN, FACTION_SCORE_MAX)
invariants.effects_per_option_max_3: PASS — _validate_card() rejects options with >3 effects. _wrap_text_as_card size()<3 guard prevents overflow (PAT-006 fix)
invariants.cards_played_single_increment: PASS — Only in StoreRun.resolve_choice() line 146. merlin_card_system.gd no longer increments (PAT-005 fix)
invariants.no_pacing_recovery: PASS — No +5HP block anywhere in store_run.gd (director q-005 applied)
invariants.active_promises_unified: PASS — init_run sets active_promises=[]. check_promise_deadlines reads/writes active_promises. promise engine writes active_promises.
invariants.autosave_run_state: PASS — _do_autosave() builds run_snapshot with biome+card_index and calls save_system.save_run_state() when run active
invariants.dominant_faction_all_biomes: PASS — All 8 BIOMES entries have dominant_faction key (cycle 11 fix)

regression_checks.PAT-006_faction_overflow: PASS — faction_tagged + size()<3 guard confirmed in merlin_llm_adapter.gd

open_bugs.detail: context_builder uses run.get('factions',{}) which is always {} (never populated). meta.faction_rep has actual values. AI context sees all factions as zero.
reputation_changed.emit(faction, new_val, float(rep_delta)) — rep_delta is raw pre-clamp delta. actual_delta = new_val - old_val not computed. UI may show +20 at rep=95 instead of +5.

new_findings.detail: DIR-S2-MNWXQ41M (day/night PS1 cycle, P22) significantly overlaps S3-AMBIENT-LIGHTING (P14) and S3-PIXEL-RENDER (P16). All three concern visual/temporal ambiance with PS1 aesthetics. Risk of duplicate work. See feedback question q-20260413-003.

MerlinStore is not an autoload — created programmatically by GameManager._ready() via call_deferred. The 1-frame await in MerlinGameController._ready() ensures safe initialization. Pattern works but is non-obvious — document in studio_learnings.

verdict.summary: Core game loop is structurally sound. Startup sequence safe. One complete card cycle verified via static trace. All 5 regressions from prior cycles PASS. 2 known open bugs (tracked). No crash path found. Game can start and run cards without deadlocks or null panics in normal flow.
